actions.intent: Start with safe top-board clearing instead of committing to the lower puppy.
Continue collecting broad value while the lower route waits.
Spend another action away from the water-facing route.
Clear the safer upper side and delay the lower rescue beat.
Only now touch route material, leaving too little water margin.
Partially open the lower puppy after the dock and water clocks are already tight.
Use a nearby side clear instead of finishing the endangered route.
Recover dock shape but spend the last comfortable action.
Let the next water rise flood the lower rescue path before extraction.

notes: Verified fail: the release board is recoverable, but enough side clearing still turns lower-first confidence into a flooded rescue path.
